---
title: 'Manna, Sarcasm, & Burritos (MSB)'
date: '2025-02-16T21:01:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: false
categories:
  - 'MSB'
---

<h4 style="text-align: left;">Manna, Sarcasm, &amp; Burritos (MSB) (Working Title...)&nbsp;</h4><div><div><i>Markus lost his wife and career, and now he’s struggling to maintain a basic existence. His highest hopes are for a burrito and a distracting sitcom. His financial needs lead him to take part as a paid test subject which leaves him having hallucinations of a portal to another reality.&nbsp;</i></div><div><i><br /></i></div><div><i>Markus is then sucked into this portal with his cat Janie, only to find that she is a talking cat, and may actually be a powerful being who organized the entire event to get him to her reality.&nbsp;</i></div><div><i><br /></i></div><div><i>After using a stick turned light-saber to kill a dangerous wolf, earning himself a magical tattoo, Markus meets Ko’Akh, a Threxan dinosaur man, and begins his journey into a world of magicians and danger, he only hopes this new world has burritos!&nbsp;&nbsp;</i></div><div><br /></div><div><br /></div><div><br /></div><div><i><b>Guiding Principle:&nbsp;</b></i></div><div><i><br /></i></div><div><div><i>In this science-fantasy, the use and study of magical Manna blurs the lines between science, magic, and theology. It offers new ways to explore age-old ideas inside exciting adventures.</i></div></div><div><i><br /></i></div><div><span style="text-align: center;"><br /></span></div><div><i><span style="text-align: center;">Cover is a placeholder, AI Generated&nbsp;</span><br style="text-align: center;" /></i></div><div><br /></div><div><br /></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/b/R29vZ2xl/AVvXsEiS_1_w-ZZ6AvnMlQMwnB-5StrvRU-R0E9YAimTpDYpXXAHKQlmP8aXWuocWm93weTgr8UZmdVYuMVGkTeJK6aG6MCdFT5lwZJ71MMM4guA4V_n4vhSoaVeN9legNwW7XTX99zbjz9lRRQJaonCQ2WBbbjh_xGyv9HZOO0nk2VtYd3j_qeqB76oJrtEXPo/s1557/MSB_Cover_Placeholder.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1557" data-original-width="1080" height="320" src="https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/b/R29vZ2xl/AVvXsEiS_1_w-ZZ6AvnMlQMwnB-5StrvRU-R0E9YAimTpDYpXXAHKQlmP8aXWuocWm93weTgr8UZmdVYuMVGkTeJK6aG6MCdFT5lwZJ71MMM4guA4V_n4vhSoaVeN9legNwW7XTX99zbjz9lRRQJaonCQ2WBbbjh_xGyv9HZOO0nk2VtYd3j_qeqB76oJrtEXPo/s320/MSB_Cover_Placeholder.jpg" width="222" /></a></div><br /><table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><tbody><tr><td style="text-align: center;">This cover is a placeholder, AI Generated&nbsp;<br /></td></tr><tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;"><br /></td></tr></tbody></table><br /><div><br /></div>
